name: RPlog_Squid_Lake_Whaladon_Spark
title: First Blood at the Whaladon Pub
summary: In the seedy Whaladon Pub deep in the domed city of Aquarius, racial tension between Quarren and Mon Calamari boils over as an angry Quarren mob forces out Calamari patrons and declares the bar their own. The Twi'lek Twila, sightseeing while her husband Gren naps at their hotel, is swept up at the door and welcomed inside, where she takes a seat beside a near-human stranded spacer calling himself Hjek Pathon, who is in truth the disguised ISB Director Korynn Fleming. Masking a murderous urge to recognize and gut her, Fleming maintains his cover, trading wary banter over drinks about the Quarren's plight and the ancient war that nearly wiped them out. Twila, sensing the danger, hints she has connections that could supply ship parts, and the two trade guarded information as the Quarren formally bar Mon Calamari from the pub. Fleming, predicting war could erupt that very night, leaves to find underwater breathers and slips out into the crowd, while an unnerved Twila comms her husband and departs to rejoin him, the spark of the planned civil war now lit.
